caption: Against a background of vertical rainbow stripes, two people interact. One person wears a yellow long-sleeved shirt and blue trousers, while the other wears a light-colored shirt and blue trousers. In the beginning, they stand apart with their arms at their sides. As the sequence progresses, they move toward each other and reach out with their hands. They begin to interlace their fingers, gradually gripping each other's hands firmly. By the end of the sequence, they are holding hands in a tight, interlocking grasp. A small tattoo is visible on the arm of the person on the right, though the text is mostly obscured. The scene remains focused on their hands and torsos throughout the interaction, with no other objects, equipment, or logos present in the frame.
